title: An Analysis of Long-Run Environmental Impacts and Multi-Criteria-Based Prioritization of the Natural Dyes in the Indian Textile Industry

summary.about: Whether greater use of natural dyes can reduce pollution across Indian textile subsectors.
summary.audience: Textile manufacturers, environmental regulators and sustainable-material researchers.
summary.method: Uses adoption scenarios, total-dissolved-solids estimates and an expert-weighted AHP ranking of cost, emissions and color fastness.
summary.insights: Natural dyes can cut emissions substantially, but synthetic-fibre applications need better technology before meeting standards reliably.
